attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.DISPUTE_SAF_TRX_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.SAF_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.DISPUTE_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.CLASS_CODE, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.INCLUDED_IN_SAF, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.DISPUTE_SECTION, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.AMOUNT, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.ORG_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL,
 (
 select DISPUTE_SAF_TRX_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL
 minus
 select DISPUTE_SAF_TRX_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.DISPUTE_SAF_TRX_ID = STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.DISPUTE_SAF_TRX_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXICM_DISPUTE_INV_ALL)
